top_categories.workout_context: 77 miles on mountain passes burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
123ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Granfondo La Guadeloupe's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before December.
At Granfondo La Guadeloupe, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Granfondo La Guadeloupe's mountain passes forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 77 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Granfondo La Guadeloupe. Train it until it feels boring.
9,459ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
9,459ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Base fitness for Granfondo La Guadeloupe. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Granfondo La Guadeloupe, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mountain passes at tempo for 77 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Low-cadence force work for 9,459ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.

race_overlay.heat: December in Capesterre-Belle-Eau, Guadeloupe can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Granfondo La Guadeloupe. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Granfondo La Guadeloupe’s 77 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Granfondo La Guadeloupe. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Granfondo La Guadeloupe requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mountain passes to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, TT Threshold, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 77 miles of mountain passes in Capesterre-Belle-Eau, Guadeloupe.
